payload.summary: 2 blockers (Security C-4 staging TLS off + hexagonal leak: application imports infrastructure exception), 10 majors (controller @WebMvcTest absent, balance-as-string serialization risk, ProblemDetail catch-all hides bugs, integration tests are mock-theatre, ArchUnit rule has no deliberate-violation fixture, Kafka producer uses StringSerializer not Avro per ADR-007, broad RedisException catch, correlationId hardcoded not from OTel, etc.), 12 minors/nits.

findings.description: Security C-4 violation: spring.data.redis.ssl.enabled=false in staging profile. Balance-inquiry data readable on cluster network.
Leaky abstraction: application/service imports infrastructure.client.UpstreamUnavailableException. Move exception to application.port.out or application.error.
Port interface Javadoc references infrastructure-layer exception type. ArchUnit rule does not catch this. Same fix as R-BE-002.
Domain in-port Javadoc references infrastructure exception type. Fix together with R-BE-002.
Task-plan §Layer 5 mandates 11 @WebMvcTest cases for BalanceDashboardController. None present. Critical gap especially _balanceIsString_notNumber.
@JsonSerialize(ToStringSerializer) is on private field, not getter. Risk balance leaks as JSON number breaking OpenAPI contract. No test asserts string form.
correlationId is UUID.randomUUID() not OTel trace ID. X-Correlation-Id will not match distributed trace. Channel also hardcoded MOBILE_BANKING.
Catch-all RuntimeException mapped to 503 + Retry-After hides programming bugs and triggers FE retries. Also Retry-After=1 only on Bulkhead, not flat 5s for all reasons.
catch(RuntimeException) lumps RedisConnectionFailureException with JsonProcessingException + NumberFormatException. Cache_miss_reason metric misleading.
Uses KafkaTemplate<String,String> + StringSerializer instead of AvroKafkaSerializer (ADR-007 §2.4). Contract test runs through JSON path so Apicurio namespace mismatch will not be caught.
Test (1) is named cacheHit but actually asserts X-Cache: MISS. Cache-hit path not integration-tested; BR-014 cache-hit-still-audits verified only at unit level.
Mocks AccountPort directly instead of stubbing HTTP via WireMock. Resilience4j chain (CB-open, timeout, bulkhead) never exercised end-to-end though pom declares WireMock.
ADR-006 §2.4 requires deliberate-violation fixture confirming rule FIRES. Current test only verifies rule PASSES against clean code. No @RequestHeader-with-X-Customer-Id rule.
get() returns RankedDashboard with correlationId="". Empty string passes record validation. If app service ever skips overwrite, FE sees blank correlationId.
BalanceSnapshot record declared but never used in src/main. Either wire as return type of AccountPort.fetchAccounts or delete.
Sort + rebuild allocates two ArrayLists. Could use indexed stream. Suggests rank shouldn't live on AccountView (immutable smell).
catch(RuntimeException) + catch(Exception) lumps bad-input bugs with real upstream errors. Programming bugs reported as UPSTREAM_ERROR.
Instant.parse can throw DateTimeParseException; caught by broad RuntimeException → false REDIS_UNAVAILABLE metric.
Filter manually builds Problem-Detail JSON, duplicating ProblemDetailAdvice shape. Prefer dedicated IdorHeaderMismatchException.
@Primary @Bean ObjectMapper overrides Spring Boot's auto-configured one, losing default modules. Also WRITE_BIGDECIMAL_AS_PLAIN is duplicated in application.yml.
Malformed JWT sub mapped to 403 — should be 401 UNAUTHORIZED (token unusable). 403 is for valid token with wrong authority.
Unused import java.net.URI.
Unused import java.net.URI.
Comment claims virtual threads but uses platform-thread pool (which is correct for TimeLimiter). Pool never shut down on context close.
actorId not validated non-null in compact constructor. KafkaAuditEventPublisher has 'unknown' fallback that masks contract violation.
@MockBean JwtDecoder declared but never stubbed; jwt() post-processor bypasses it.
Channel.fromUserAgent called from filter but service hardcodes MOBILE_BANKING. Centralize after R-BE-007 fix.
No @JsonProperty on getters; future refactor could silently rename wire fields.
X-Cache derived from dashboard.cacheHit in controller — acceptable but worth noting.
freshness field stored but recomputed on read — redundant storage. Remove.
All 3 DataSource autoconfigurations excluded correctly per impl-notes §2.
CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY fails inside a transactional migration. Add Flyway --##NO-TRANSACTION-BLOCK marker or per-migration transactional=false.

metrics_checked.coverage_estimate: 70-75% line (likely fails 80% JaCoCo BUNDLE rule due to missing BalanceDashboardControllerTest)
metrics_checked.lint: not measurable — no Spotless/Checkstyle/Spotbugs plugin in pom.xml
metrics_checked.build: not run by reviewer (static review only)
